hints.text: **Monte Titano** (739 m, with its **three towers**) dominates and is visible from almost every point
Landscape = smooth **agricultural hills**, many small winding roads, lush Mediterranean vegetation
Plates **short, white, blue lettering** (most European plates are longer w/ blue strips)
Road signs, bollards & poles **identical to Italy's**; many signs point to nearby **Rimini** (Italy)
The only country with **yellow chevrons + burgundy-red arrows**; elaborate blue-painted crosswalks w/ hanging signs
**Lime-green bins** common (some now black in Gen4); Superstrada = the only divided road; historic centre = Gen3 trekker
